title: KE-829
content:
{{Top|leg|canon=Unidentified stormtrooper (Tractor Beam 12)|notoc=1}} {{Nickname}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image=[[File:BT16_stormies.png]] |name=KE-829 |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] {{C|[[Cloning/Legends|clone]]}}{{TCG|set=Battle of Yavin|cardname=Stormtrooper KE-829|link=https://swtcg.com/Content/Images/Cards/BOY/Stormtrooper_KE_829.webp?v=2}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]][[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]{{Film|IV}} **[[Stormtrooper Corps/Legends|Stormtrooper Corps]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Do you know what's going on?''"
"''Maybe it's another drill.|KE-829 and [[Unidentified stormtrooper (BT-16)/Legends|his partner]]|audio=KE-829.flac|}} '''KE-829''' was the designation of a [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] in service to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The [[Trooper/Legends|trooper]] served on board the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]] in the [[Standard day/Legends|days]] leading up to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] where the [[Battle station/Legends|battle station]] was ultimately destroyed by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. ==Biography== During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] served in the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Military]] as a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] and was designated "KE-829." [[Gender/Legends|He]] was one of the [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] stationed on board the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]] in the [[Standard day/Legends|days]] prior to its destruction at the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], and was on guard duty near [[Tractor Beam 12/Legends|Tractor Beam 12]] by the [[Time/Legends|time]] the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] arrived on the [[Battle station/Legends|battle station]]. When the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] deactivated the [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]] to allow the ''Millennium Falcon'' to leave [[Docking Bay 327/Legends|Docking Bay 327]], he overheard KE-829 and [[Unidentified stormtrooper (BT-16)/Legends|another trooper]] conversing about the [[BT-16 perimeter droid]]. After accomplishing his objective, Kenobi used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to confuse the [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] and escape the area. Specifically, Kenobi tricked KE-829 into thinking there was something behind them, eventually attributing it to nothing more than outgassing. ==Behind the scenes== The non-[[canon]] comic [[Tag & Bink Are Dead 1|''Tag & Bink Are Dead'' 1]] retconned these KE-829 and his partner to make them [[Tag Greenly|Tag Greenley]] and [[Bink Otauna/Legends|Bink Otauna]]. ==Appearances== *{{Film|IV}} {{1st}} *[[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope (junior novelization)|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'' junior novelization]] *''[[The Life and Legend of Obi-Wan Kenobi]]'' ===Non-canon appearances=== *[[Tag & Bink Are Dead 1|''Tag & Bink Are Dead'' 1]] ==Sources== *{{CCG|set=Premiere Limited|cardname=Affect Mind}} {{Po}} *{{FactFile|52|LEI 9-12|The Rescue of Princess Leia}} {{Po}} *{{TCG|set=Battle of Yavin|cardname=Stormtrooper KE-829|link=https://swtcg.com/Content/Images/Cards/BOY/Stormtrooper_KE_829.webp?v=2}} {{1stID|KE-829}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{FFGTCG|set=Star Wars: The Card Game Core Set|cardname=Jedi Mind Trick|link=core/jedi-mind-trick-core-3-4}} {{Po}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Death Star residents]] [[Category:Human clones]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Stormtroopers of the Galactic Empire]]
